benchmark.name: EPOP
benchmark.description: Plant-health benchmark corpus for structured information extraction over phytosanitary monitoring reports.
entity_scope: species mentions normalized to NCBI Taxonomy
relation_scope: relations such as Causes and Transmits

paper.title: EPOP: A Benchmark Corpus for Assessing NLP Models on Structured Information Extraction in Plant Health
paper.venue: Proceedings of the Fifteenth Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2026)
paper.conference: The Fifteenth Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2026)

documents.title: Corpus for the epidemiomonitoring of plant
documents.license_note: Use for text mining scientific research; no redistribution or unauthorized sharing of EPOP documents.
documents.attribution: EPOP Documents, provided by INRAE and the ESV Platform

annotations.title: Training and development dataset for information extraction in plant epidemiomonitoring
annotations.description: Gold train and development annotations with seven entity types, normalization to NCBI Taxonomy and GeoNames, binary relations, ternary relations, and character-offset references.

annotation_guidelines.title: Guidelines for the annotation of the corpus Epidemiomonitoring Of Plant (EPOP)

paper_aligned_usage.ift: Use EPOP train for instruction fine-tuning and exclude EPOP dev.
paper_aligned_usage.inference: Run schema-constrained inference on the 55 EPOP development documents.
paper_aligned_usage.evaluation: Evaluate relation extraction against EPOP development gold annotations.
